title: feat(polli): CLI polish + video demo skill
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The CLI learns to speak
gist.blurb: The polli CLI just got a massive glow-up. Text streams by default, tables fit your terminal perfectly, and you can now play generated audio straight from the command line.
gist.summary: Polished the polli CLI with default text streaming, improved terminal formatting, a new `--play` flag for audio, and a Claude skill for creating video demos.
gist.impact: CLI users will enjoy a much smoother experience with real-time text streaming, perfectly sized tables, and instant audio playback right in the terminal.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a clapperboard next to a glowing retro terminal. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head is wearing headphones, listening to audio.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret and holding a clapperboard next to a glowing retro terminal. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head wears headphones, happily listening to audio. The terminal screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) and cyan text. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret and holding a clapperboard next to a glowing retro terminal. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head wears headphones, happily listening to audio. The terminal screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) and cyan text.
